steps.title: Identify the function of “quindoxin (C₈H₆N₂O₂)”
steps.content: ”Quindoxin” is the specific name of the compound — it's essential to identifying which compound we're discussing. Without it, “the gaseous compound” would be incomplete and vague.

steps.title: Apply the comma rule for identifying phrases
steps.content:
When a phrase is essential to identifying a noun (it specifies which one), no commas are used before or after it.

Choices A, C, and D all introduce commas in various positions, incorrectly treating “quindoxin” as optional extra information rather than necessary identification.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
